title: Accept remaining CodeQL suggestions for release PR

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Behavior spec: release PR #277 should incorporate the remaining CodeQL mechanical suggestions without behavior changes: unique duplicate test names, math.isfinite finite-number check, remove unused imports, avoid unnecessary lambda wrappers, and resolve duplicate chat_recorder method definition.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Accepted the remaining CodeQL suggestions: removed shadowed steering-message method, kept one metadata parser, made duplicate test names unique, replaced finite-number self-comparison with math.isfinite, removed unused datetime/timezone import, and replaced unnecessary object lambdas. Verified with python -m pytest on the affected Python test files: 155 passed.
